items.title: The CPU Is Back in the Stack — and Nobody Budgeted for It
items.description: The CPU never left the stack. It was reclassified — quietly, and incorrectly — as support compute. items.title: Hash-Based Signatures: The Most Conservative Path to Post-Quantum
items.description: Nearly every digital signature in use today — RSA, ECDSA, Ed25519 — rests on a number-theory problem that a large quantum computer would solve efficiently.
